Name: Personal Fave – Wild Card
Description: No prompt, no rules. Share a song you love that you’ve been dying to submit — your personal wildcard.

Name: Valentine’s Day Songs
Description: Get us prepared for the holiday ahead! Love songs, anti‑love songs, heartbreak ballads — anything that captures that Valentine energy.

Name: Diss Tracks
Description: Shots fired. Bring your favorite diss track — serious or playful — and tell us who got roasted.

Name: Middle School Dance Hits
Description: The tracks that defined awkward slow dances, gym floor grind circles, and peak puberty.

Name: Joke Songs
Description: Comedy tracks, memes, musical goofs — make us laugh or groan. Bonus points for cleverness.

Name: Plot Twist Covers
Description: Covers that sound completely different from the original.

Name: Staying Warm by the Fire
Description: Think flannel, candlelight, and vinyl. Warm acoustic vibes or slow‑burning soul.
